tool.name: HAL halValidate
tool.description: is to check if a hal file is valid
tool.command: if halValidate #if $format: --format '$format' #end if #if $genome: --genome '$genome' #end if #if $settings.cache == "custom" #if $settings.memory.hdf5InMemory --hdf5InMemory #else --hdf5CacheBytes $settings.memory.hdf5CacheBytes --hdf5CacheMDC $settings.memory.hdf5CacheMDC --hdf5CacheRDC $settings.memory.hdf5CacheRDC --hdf5CacheW0 $settings.memory.hdf5CacheW0 #end if #end if '$in_hal_file'; then echo '{ "valid": true, "message": "File valid" }' > result.json else echo '{ "valid": false, "message": "File invalid" }' > result.json fi

param.label: Genome
param.help: Specific genome to validate instead of entire file

tool.help:
Check if hal database is valid.
**USAGE:** halValidate [Options] <halFile>
